description: Interface contract between Aegis and Sentinel. Defines boundary responsibilities, status/doctor response schemas, error codes, and failure modes for the coexistence model.

sentinel_status_response.title: SentinelStatusResponse
sentinel_status_response.description: Response from sentinel status command. Reports current protection state.

protection_status.description: Whether Sentinel tool-boundary enforcement is currently active

policy_loaded.description: Whether Sentinel has successfully loaded its policy config

hooks_active.description: List of active hook names (e.g. PreToolUse, PostToolUse)

sentinel_doctor_response.title: SentinelDoctorResponse
sentinel_doctor_response.description: Response from sentinel doctor command. Health check with per-component status.

overall_status.description: Aggregate health status across all checks

boundary_table.aegis_role: Behavioral gate checks subagent output for BEHAVIORAL_GATE_CHECK marker (output-level verification)
boundary_table.sentinel_role: Checks each Edit/Write call against file allowlist (tool-level enforcement)
boundary_table.resolution: Both run. Sentinel acts first at tool invocation. Aegis acts second at output verification. Different checks at different layers, no conflict.

boundary_table.aegis_role: Deploy preflight guard verifies state, runs rollback drill (stage-level gate)
boundary_table.sentinel_role: May block dangerous Bash commands such as rm -rf (tool-level enforcement)
boundary_table.resolution: Both run. Sentinel prevents dangerous commands. Aegis prevents premature deployment. Complementary.

boundary_table.sentinel_role: Blocks access to .env, credentials, and other sensitive files (tool-level enforcement)
boundary_table.resolution: Sentinel only. Aegis does not manage file-level access control.

boundary_table.aegis_role: Logs bypass audit, enforces consultation requirements (stage-level gate)
boundary_table.resolution: Aegis only. Sentinel does not know about pipeline stages.

SENTINEL_UNREACHABLE.description: Sentinel status command failed or not found

SENTINEL_INVALID_RESPONSE.description: Sentinel response did not match expected schema

failure_modes.unreachable: Log warning. Pipeline continues without tool-boundary enforcement awareness.
failure_modes.invalid_response: Log schema violation. Treat as unreachable.
failure_modes.disabled: Skip all Sentinel checks. No log entry needed.
